title: Neofox
description: a create modpack for my friends and I that i created thats ment for prism lancher on 1.21.1 neoforge with mods like create and such
body: a neoforge(and now fabric) modpack create with create mod and some addons with other mods for optimation, it is a modpack for 1.21.1 but as i am using a much lower end computer it is uplayable if you dont have a person with a kinda modern pc for them to run a server off of.i recoment adding graphine but it can break the create mod a bit. if you want more optmization but not as much stability play neoneoneo. currently you need to import a 1.21.1 world to play i dont know why if any can fix it i would be greatful. this modpack includes a lot of biome additons like oh the boimes weave gone, terralith, ext, some new structers from mods like under ground viliages, towns and towers, it has some create adons like, create:cardboard things, create the factory must grow, and many more. it has some of macaw's mods, for example macaw's roofs or macaw's windoes, some clothing mods like self expresstion and self expression slim. it has serene sesons and pax romana for fast traveling. some of mods used for optomizing are; sodum, lithum, noisum, Ruok, gpu tape, chloride. but one of the mods used for otomizing WILL deleate your items when you die, so i added the corpse mod. make sure you import a world to play by going into you .minecraft folder (if you use prism like me) take a difrent 1.21.1 world copy it then go the neoneoneo re instance and move or paste the world there. some other mods are exposure for photos, dynamic trees, sounds, xaeros world and mini maps and xaero plus it also has waystone and create nurismatics. - create mod - quite stable - backpacks - lots of optimizing - a bit more realisum - and more to come - the fabric vertion is much faster yet it cant include a few mods the neoforge vertion has like create mod and its addons ################################################################################## join the discord - request mod addons - chat with members - report bugs and/or possible fixes - have fun _______________________________________________________________________________________ warning: i dont know if this pack will work at all for others but i hope it does _______________________________________________________________________________________ i have no idea if this mack works on other devices, so far no it doesnt
